SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. NOT PRESENT, BUT REPRESENTED BY JOHN WILEY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - PL. TO PAY $3,330 RENT & DAMAGES BY CASHIERS CHECK ON 5-16-94, 5PM - $900 ATTY FEES & COSTS TO BE PAID AT $75 A MONTH FROM 6-5-94 THRU 5-5-95 - IF DEF. FAILS ANY PART OF THIS AGREEMENT PL. BY EXPARTE MOT & WITH 24 HRS TELEPHONIC NOTICE TO DEF. MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2825 VAN NESS AVE, #5, S.F, CA. & MONEY JUDGMENT FOR BALANCE OF OWED. DEF. MAY GIVE 30 DAYS NOTICE TO MOVE AT ANY TIME AFTER 6-5-94 & MUST PAY BAL. OWING OF $900 ATTY FEES & COSTS. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. PL. ATTY TO PREPARE STIP.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAMAMOTO, RUSSELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2825 VAN NESS AVE, APT.#5, S.F, CA. $3,330.00 RENT, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,230.00, LEASE FORFEITED
